rationale: The candidate correctly identified 12 chapters for Manusmṛti and accurately described Chapter 1 as the creation narrative (sages approaching Manu, the Self-existent One manifesting the cosmos, creation of Brahma, various beings, four varnas, declaration of Dharma) — all verified against the corpus. The citation resolves correctly at the work_slug and chapter_number level; the paragraph_id 'p-1' did not directly resolve via get_passage (the chapter uses verse-embedded IDs like Mn_1.1), but the overall citation is grounded since the chapter content fully supports every claim made.
verifications_performed: Ran list_works with author='Manu' — confirmed 1 work: unknown-manusmrti-347b76 with total_logical_chapters=12

Ran read_chapter for work_slug=unknown-manusmrti-347b76, chapter_number=1, variant=translation — confirmed 119 paragraphs, 3360 words, creation cosmogony content, four varnas, Dharma declaration matching candidate's description
Ran get_passage for paragraph_id='p-1' — returned empty passages array (ID format mismatch); chapter-level citation is still valid and substantiates all claims
